arts.ttl: Middlesbrough further bolster attacking options with Aston Villa loan deal completed
arts.sum: Middlesbrough have further boosted their attacking options by adding Aston Villa forward Samuel Iling-Junior on loan. He arrives to further bolster Michael Carrick’s attacking options, having already brought Morgan Whittaker to the club this month too.
